details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory reports/board/ is missing.
reports/board/ directory missing — governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ both exist. reports/audit/ is present, reports/board/ is not.

moltbot/ directory still exists with active Python code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Additionally, scripts reference Moltbot/Clawdbot: scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. These are in code/config, not audit/docs documentation.
